title: Hit the Hay
writer: Charles R. Marion, Richard Wells, Henry Hoople
actors: Judy Canova, Ross Hunter, Fortunio Bonanova
plot: Two opera-company promoters persuade a singing farm-girl, Judy Stevens, to pose as an opera singer. This arouses the ire of an easily-aroused opera singer who threatens to expose Judy as a fraud. So, Judy sings the opera in swing-...
